body.title: Staged intention→verification compiler pipeline (Akien napkin sketch, 2026-07-10)
body.status: brainstorming — incomplete, back-of-napkin; captured verbatim so it is not lost, NOT a settled decision
body.text:
Akien's in-progress idea for the shape of the dev-process as a staged compiler. Each stage is a transform that takes the prior stage's output + a body of knowledge and ADDS a layer, carrying intent forward from raw user input all the way to long-term verification. Prompted by the disposition problem 'where does a ticket-that-needs-design go?' — answer: there is no design home yet; we would CREATE a workflow that routes a ticket back to a design STAGE. The pipeline is that design stage's home.

STAGES (as sketched, verbatim shape):
  interviewer         inputs: user, history                                        -> outputs: intentions + whys + how-to-verify, constraints
  intention extractor inputs: above + relevant history                            -> outputs: adds hierarchical intentions
  designer            inputs: above + design patterns                             -> outputs: adds design
  ticketer            inputs: above + ticketing rules + prerun of prebuild steps  -> outputs: writes into the JSON ticket
                              (orientation, constraints, etc.)
  ... and the rest of the levels get fleshed out from intention, one part to the next, all the way through long-term verifications.

TWO NOVEL PROPERTIES beyond today's ticket:
  1. Each ticket/artifact lists not ONLY the forward build path (as it does now) but ALSO the return-for-learning path and the return-for-more-high-level-work path. Bidirectional edges, not a one-way chart.
  2. The pipeline is continuous from user-intent to long-term verification — the ticket JSON is one station in it, not the origin.

WHERE IT WAS HEADING: 'toward our intentions' — this concretizes the intention-compiler / compiled-inference vision as an explicit stage graph, and it is the natural forward home for the already-ticketed intentions chain (extract-intentions-from-chatlogs, intentions-store, intentions-as-living-entities).

CONNECTS TO (do not rebuild — reconcile against):
  - build_packet pre-inference compiler (packages intent+constraints+proof_plan) — this pipeline is the multi-stage generalization
  - Delta-UU factory-of-factories (Vetinari->Hubert->DS) and the reflexive intention-compiler
  - dev-pipeline-stations decision (forward stations) + feedback-edges architecture point (the RETURN/learning edges this makes first-class)
  - ticket-as-chart provenance ledger (T-ticket-as-chart-provenance-ledger) — today's forward-only chart; this adds return paths
  - goals->intentions, intentions-as-living-entities, graph-trees-self-aware telos (the north star)

OPEN (for Akien when ready to formalize): the full stage list past 'ticketer' through long-term verification; what each return-edge carries and to which stage it returns; whether stages are devices, workflows, or graph-tree nodes.
